title: Staff: Lucy Manyara
display_label: Lucy Manyara, DBA, MBA, CRA, CFRA, CPRA — Budget Officer
staff_title: Budget Officer, Office of Research Administration

education.institution: University of the District of Columbia

content:
Dr. Lucy Manyara, DBA, MBA, CRA, CFRA, CPRA is the Budget Officer, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-3544. Email: lucy.manyara@morgan.edu.

Dr. Lucy Manyara serves as a Budget Officer in the Office of Research Administration (ORA) at Morgan State University. She has held this role since October 2020 and brings over 15 years of experience in grants management.

She holds a BS in Business Administration from the University of the District of Columbia, an MBA in Finance from Morgan State University, and a DBA in Business Administration from the University of Maryland Global Campus.

Her certifications include Certified Research Administrator (CRA), Certified Financial Research Administrator (CFRA), and Certified Pre-Award Research Administrator (CPRA) from the Research Administrators Certification Council.

In her current role, Dr. Manyara plays a key part in reviewing budgets and requisitions to ensure compliance with federal, state, and private sponsor guidelines, as well as university policies. Her sharp attention to detail and focus on process improvement have resulted in significant efficiency gains while maintaining strict internal controls.

Education: DBA in Business Administration, University of Maryland Global Campus; MBA in Finance, Morgan State University; BS in Business Administration, University of the District of Columbia.

Certifications: Certified Research Administrator (CRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Financial Research Administrator (CFRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Pre-Award Research Administrator (CPRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council.
